name: Skyblock Ultimate
creator: Pickaxe Studios
shortDesc: The definitive skyblock survival experience with 500+ custom islands, 8-player multiplayer, and progressive difficulty across 8 biomes.
longDesc: Skyblock Ultimate is the #1 rated skyblock addon for Minecraft Bedrock Edition, featuring 500+ custom islands across 8 biomes, 8-player multiplayer co-op, and progressive difficulty scaling. With a {rating}-star rating across {reviewCount}+ reviews on the Minecraft Marketplace, it is the most popular and highest-rated skyblock experience available for Bedrock.
features: 500+ Custom Islands — Each uniquely designed with specific resources, challenges, and rewards
8 Unique Biomes — Forest, Desert, Ocean, Nether, End, Ice, Mushroom, and Void
Progressive Difficulty — Four tiers: Easy, Medium, Hard, Extreme
8-Player Multiplayer Co-op — Only the host needs to own the addon
Custom Crafting System — Over 30 custom recipes for unique items
Island Rating System — Track your progress with a built-in rating system
50+ Achievements — Discover islands, defeat bosses, complete biome challenges
Regular Content Updates — 12 content updates released in the past year

reviews.author: SkyblockFan2025
reviews.text: Best skyblock addon I've played on Bedrock. The island variety is incredible and multiplayer co-op works flawlessly. Easily worth the Minecoins.

reviews.author: BlockBuilder_MC
reviews.text: 500+ islands is no joke. My friends and I have been playing for weeks and still finding new challenges. The progressive difficulty keeps things interesting.

reviews.author: MinecraftMom
reviews.text: My kids love this addon. Easy to set up, and they play together on our home network. The variety of islands keeps them engaged for hours.

faqs.q: What is the best Minecraft skyblock addon for Bedrock Edition?
faqs.a: Skyblock Ultimate by Pickaxe Studios is the highest-rated skyblock addon on the Minecraft Marketplace, with a {rating}-star rating across {reviewCount}+ reviews. It features 500+ custom islands, 8-player multiplayer, and progressive difficulty across 8 biomes. Available for {price} Minecoins.

faqs.q: Does Skyblock Ultimate work with multiplayer?
faqs.a: Yes, Skyblock Ultimate fully supports multiplayer co-op for up to 8 players. The host player needs to own the addon, and other players can join without purchasing it. All features including island progression, custom crafting, and achievements work in multiplayer.

faqs.q: How many islands are in Skyblock Ultimate?
faqs.a: Skyblock Ultimate contains over 500 custom-designed islands spread across 8 unique biomes. Each island has unique challenges, resources, and rewards. New islands are added regularly through content updates.

faqs.q: What Minecraft version does Skyblock Ultimate require?
faqs.a: Skyblock Ultimate requires Minecraft Bedrock Edition version {minecraftVersion}. It is compatible with all Bedrock platforms including Windows, iOS, Android, Xbox, PlayStation, and Nintendo Switch.

faqs.q: How do I install Skyblock Ultimate?
faqs.a: Open Minecraft Bedrock Edition, go to the Marketplace from the main menu, search for 'Skyblock Ultimate' by Pickaxe Studios, purchase for {price} Minecoins, and the addon downloads automatically. Then create a new world and activate the behavior pack and resource pack.
